description: Draft of a note written on the back of a page of Hebrew poetry. Begins with the glyph. Then, "Know that from the day I left Alexandria, I did not acquire profit or even a quarter(?), but may (God) do for the sake of His name and be good to us all. And peace to all 'sons of the covenant' (בני ברית)." Mentions Abū l-Faḍl.
